title: Hexlink
description:
An addon for hexcasting.
You can mediafy entity, block, item, potion effects and then use them in spells.
body:
![Hexlink2](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/blob/master/imgs/Hexlink2.png?raw=true)
# Why
Adding a good number of spell effects is time consuming. This mod just add a way for hex casting to interact with many interface like blocks, items or entities. Like the motes from Hexal but for Entity, Potion and blocks too.

# Content
## Upgraded Book  ![upgraded_book_empty](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/assets/65395998/a00eaf0c-4561-480b-9fa1-9317acf1019a)
A better version of the spellbook:  

- He cast spell using the caster stack so you can add iotas on your stack as an input and he can can leave iotas on the stack as an output.
- You can cast a spell by right clicking with it
- He is colorable with color spirits.
  
## Special Staff
![spirits](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/blob/master/imgs/special_wand.gif?raw=true)
A programmable and colorable staff. Write a spell in it, then when you draw a pattern using it, the spell treat it and return your new stack. You can make a staff that cast the pattern and add it to a list at the bottom of the stack , a staff that don't call the pattern but instead draw it in the world using block, or a staff for writing a pattern to a scroll on wall you are looking just by drawing it per example.

## Spirits
![spirits](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/blob/master/imgs/Spirit.gif?raw=true)
You can extract a spirit from an entity into a spirit container using an extraction crystal.
Then you can move them from a container to another, mix them, and manifest them.
For example, you can manifest a Shears Spirit on a sheep to shear it, you can manifest a Iron Golem Spirit on a position to summon an Iron Golem, then manifest a Wolf Spirit on the Iron Golem to summon a Wolf ridden by the Iron Golem and finally manifest Bone Spirits on the Wolf to tame it.
[You can find more examples here](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/wiki/Exemples-Spells)


## Bags and Tablets 
![bags](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/blob/master/imgs/Bags.png?raw=true)
They contains spirits. So you can have Spirits available at any time to manifest them.

## Media Vortex
![vortex](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/blob/master/imgs/Vortex.gif?raw=true)
A media vortex can be summoned using Vortex Formation, it can contains Spirit for a short time, and if you filled it with the rights Spirits in the good order, it can create new Spirits by mixing them.  
[Use EMI to see the recipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)

## Mixed Pigment
![pigment](https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/assets/65395998/f9a5b6f1-7a14-483d-8c1c-4c1adf0c36c1)
New 2-colors custom pigments, you can find predefined ones in various chests and craft them.  

# Examples
https://github.com/Jempasam/Hexlink/wiki/Exemples-Spells)
